title: leiotulus aureus
intro: Leiotulus aureus, also known as African bush tea or yellow helichrysum, is a flowering plant species native to Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Leiotulus aureus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Leiotulus aureus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
